Case Study • Various

How we helped Dips Apparel Ltd. Achieves EcoVadis Platinum Medal, Joining the Top 1% of Companies Globally for Sustainability Excellence

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Dips Apparel Ltd., manufacturer in the ready-made garment (RMG) sector, has been awarded the EcoVadis Platinum Medal, the highest level of recognition for sustainability performance. This achievement places Dips Apparel among the top 1% of companies globally assessed by EcoVadis, out of more than 130,000 organizations evaluated across 180+ countries and 220+ industry sectors, reflecting strong and consistent performance across environmental, social, ethical, and supply-chain sustainability criteria.

The Platinum recognition reflects Dips Apparel Ltd.’s structured approach to sustainability, supported by robust governance systems, transparent reporting practices, and continuous improvement initiatives across its operations and supply chain. The company demonstrated strong alignment with international ESG expectations, addressing key focus areas such as environmental management, labor and human rights, business ethics, and responsible procurement.

EcoVadis Performance Highlights

  • 🌿 Environment: 87 / 100
  • 👥 Labor & Human Rights: 86 / 100 
  • ⚖️ Ethics: 82 / 100 
  • 🔗 Sustainable Procurement: 79 / 100 

📊 Overall Score: 85 / 100
🏅 Global Percentile Ranking: 99+ 

These outstanding results underscore Dips Apparel Ltd.’s position as a sustainability leader within the global apparel 
manufacturing industry. Achieving EcoVadis Platinum status requires not only strong policies and compliance 
mechanisms but also a deeply embedded culture of environmental responsibility, ethical business conduct and  continuous improvement across the organization.

Dips Apparel Ltd.’s success was achieved with the strategic support of Growlity, a global ESG and sustainability consulting  firm. Growlity played a pivotal role throughout the EcoVadis assessment journey—supporting framework alignment,strengthening documentation, validating data, enhancing performance metrics, and enabling transparent and  audit-ready sustainability reporting. 

Leadership Perspectives

Achieving the EcoVadis Platinum Medal is a significant 
milestone for Dips Apparel Ltd. and a reflection of our  long-standing commitment to responsible business  practices. Sustainability is a strategic priority for us, embedded in our governance, operations, Sustainability is a strategic priority for us, embedded in our governance, operations, and decision-making processes. This recognition reinforces our belief that ethical conduct, social responsibility, and environmental stewardship are essential to building a resilient and future-ready organization.

Ms. Shammi Nasrin Choudhury

Chairman, Dips Apparel Ltd.

Achieving the EcoVadis Platinum Medal is a significant milestone for Dips Apparel Ltd. and a reflection of our long-standing commitment to responsible business practices. Sustainability is a strategic priority for us, embedded in our governance, operations, and decision-making processes. This recognition reinforces our belief that ethical conduct, social responsibility, and environmental stewardship are essential to building a resilient and future-ready organization.”

Mr. Mohammed Jashim Uddin

Managing Director, Dips Apparel Ltd.

The EcoVadis Platinum recognition represents the collective efforts of our entire team and our disciplined approach to continuous improvement. At Dips Apparel Ltd., we focus on responsible manufacturing, worker well-being, and transparent operations across our value chain. This achievement strengthens our commitment to meeting global sustainability expectations and delivering long-term value to our customers and stakeholders.

Dr. Nitin Dumasia

President & CEO, Growlity Private Limited

About Growlity Private Limited

Growlity is a global ESG and sustainability consulting firm dedicated to helping organizations achieve measurable, credible, and audit-ready sustainability outcomes. With deep expertise in EcoVadis assessments, ESG strategy, sustainability reporting, and climate action, Growlity supports companies in translating sustainability commitments into real-world performance aligned with global best practices.

About Dips Apparel Ltd

Dips Apparel Ltd. is a garment manufacturing company serving international markets with knit and woven apparel. Known for its focus on quality, compliance, and responsible manufacturing, the company integrates sustainability into its operational and governance frameworks to meet evolving global buyer and regulatory expectations.
